meta.title: construction-egy
meta.description: Web marketplace for construction with Supabase

home.title: construction-egy
home.intro: A web app and marketplace for scaffolding: photos, bookings, and secure access with Supabase. Use the tabs below or the links to sign in.

auth.loginSubtitle: Enter your email and password to continue

signup.title: Create account
signup.subtitle: Register with email and password to get started
signup.otpHint: Enter the {count}-digit code sent to your inbox. If it doesn’t arrive within two minutes, check spam or tap “Resend code”.
signup.verifyFailed: Sign-in did not complete. Try again.
signup.checkEmail: Check your email or your Supabase project settings.

accountSuspended.title: Your account is suspended
accountSuspended.body: Your session has been ended. If you think this is a mistake, contact support.

gallery.loadError: Could not load listings. Ensure the public listings migration is applied on Supabase (file 20260323140000_listings_public_read_anon.sql), then try again.

favorites.migrationHint: If you see a table error, run the `listing_favorites` database migration from the supabase/migrations folder.
favorites.title: Favorites
favorites.subtitle: Listings you saved to review later.
favorites.emptyHint: Tap the red heart in the gallery or on a listing page.

profile.title: My account
profile.subtitleGuest: Profile and settings — sign in for more.
profile.noProfileRecord: No profile record was found. Fill in the fields below and save to create one.

rfqPage.title: Request for quotation
rfqPage.subtitle: Upload spreadsheets (items) and supporting files. Sign in required.

rfqUpload.hint: Spreadsheets (.xls, .xlsx) are parsed into line items. Other types are stored as attachments in your draft.
rfqUpload.emptyItems: No line items yet. Upload an Excel file with a description column.

errors.TOO_MANY_FILES: Too many files in one request.
errors.FILE_TOO_LARGE: One of the files is too large.
errors.TOTAL_TOO_LARGE: Total upload size is too large.
errors.SPREADSHEET_NO_ROWS: No data rows in the spreadsheet.
errors.SPREADSHEET_MISSING_DESCRIPTION_COLUMN: Missing a description column. Use the template headers (Arabic or English).
errors.SPREADSHEET_TOO_MANY_ROWS: Too many rows in the spreadsheet.
errors.UNSUPPORTED_EXTENSION: This file type is not allowed.
errors.REPLACE_TARGET_NOT_FOUND: Attachment to replace was not found.
errors.REPLACE_ATTACHMENT_UNUSED: Replace was requested but no matching file was processed.
errors.SPREADSHEET_UNMAPPED_COLUMNS: Some columns were not mapped and were ignored.
